title: Centrocarpha radula
taxonomy: Centrocarpha radula belongs to the class of brown algae, specifically being a type of brown algae. It is classified within the phylum Ochrophyta, a group of organisms that include various types of brown algae and diatoms. The class to which Centrocarpha radula belongs is the Phaeophyceae. Centrocarpha radula is further classified within the order Fucales, which comprises various species of brown algae. This classification helps us understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Centrocarpha radula.
